# DREEMCORP

> DREEMCORP is a creative agency and media production house specializing in video editing, social media content creation, personal branding, and visual production.

## What We Do

- **Video Editing**: Long-form and short-form editing — cutting, color correction, SFX, custom transitions. Footage from hours of raw material shaped into cohesive, high-impact stories.
- **Social Media Content**: Reels, TikToks, and YouTube content engineered for engagement. Platform-native production for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.
- **Personal Branding**: Full visual identity packages — profile pictures, channel covers, outros, logo design — built for cohesive online personas.
- **Visual Production**: Photography direction, graphics, and creative visual assets for brands and individuals.

## Notable Clients & Collaborations

- **Amira Tahri** — Full YouTube branding pack (profile picture, cover, outro), long-form and short-form video editing, collaborations with Najib Amhali, Numidia, and DutchPerformante
- **Najib Amhali** — Social media content
- **CoolSouls** — TikTok short-form content and photoshoot BTS
- **Ta Joela** — Short-form content via Immersive Studios
- **92Minerals** — Instagram Ramadan Special AD with Ertugrul Bayrak
- **Dennis Toppin** — Social media content
- **BerraCuts Barbershop** — Instagram video AD
- **FitnessFloors.nl** — Instagram video AD with SinCity Gym
- **Nabil Haryouli** — Instagram Reels content
